nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for communications
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of stilted, unnatural text
nodes.grounding_span: I explain to the model what sort of communication I am trying to write

nodes.label: AI as creative design tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to personal creative satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: I do not like to let it do actual design even though it could

nodes.label: AI as template generator for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for nuanced tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Eventually I had the AI draft me a sample letter I could just copy to everyone

nodes.label: AI as internal routing system
nodes.label_negative: AI as frustrating, error-prone routing system
nodes.grounding_span: The AI that runs our internal routing ... is a constant nightmare and I hate it

nodes.label: AI as tool for mundane tasks with PII constraints
nodes.label_negative: AI as unable to handle PII-sensitive tasks
nodes.grounding_span: there are some pieces of information that I can't give the AI for compliance reasons

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression in communications
nodes.grounding_span: I need my emails to sound personable and friendly

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and ownership
nodes.grounding_span: There is a satisfaction to seeing a final copy ... knowing that you pieced it together yourself

nodes.label: Efficiency and reduced mental load
nodes.grounding_span: I would have to wrack my brain for the content every time

nodes.label: Reliable and accurate task completion
nodes.grounding_span: It also is not very good at figuring out what the specific thing I am asking about

nodes.label: Human-centered customer service
nodes.grounding_span: customers ... get very frustrated having to deal with too much AI screening

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for drafting templates
nodes.grounding_span: the first one it made was very good and I ended up using that template letter for over a year

nodes.label: Frustration with AI routing system
nodes.grounding_span: The AI that runs our internal routing ... is a constant nightmare and I hate it

nodes.label: Preference for human creativity in design
nodes.grounding_span: I do not like to let it do actual design even though it could

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI handling PII tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Eventually it might end up being considered safe enough for us to use for the mundane tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — back-and-forth editing with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will send it a couple refinements until it's like 85% of the way

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation — creative vs. mundane
nodes.grounding_span: The designing part is creative and enjoyable, so I like to do that myself
